name: pharmaqms
description: PharmaQMS - 21 CFR Part 11-capable pharma eQMS SaaS

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.seed: npm run build -w @pharmaqms/shared && npm run seed -w server
scripts.migrate:equipment-rooms: npm run build -w @pharmaqms/shared && npm run migrate:equipment-rooms -w server
scripts.test: npm run build -w @pharmaqms/shared && npm run test --workspace=server --workspace=client
